overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking through the colorful Mediterranean-inspired town of Beauclair. The character descends winding cobblestone streets, passes through ornate stone archways, and navigates past NPCs while scenic lake and mountain views emerge in the background. The footage features vibrant teal-orange color grading and high-quality fantasy architecture.

scene_state.functional_zone: upper town cobblestone street between historic townhouses

agents.ego_description: walking down the sloping cobblestone street between tall historic buildings, approaching an ornate stone archway

notable_agents.action: woman in dark dress with white parasol walking uphill toward camera
guard standing watch near building entrance

entered.detail: vibrant red-orange historic townhouse with shuttered windows and flower boxes
tall beige stone building with arched windows and decorative masonry
red and gray cobblestone pavement sloping downward
ornate stone archway with red columns and hanging flower baskets marking the street end

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a narrow cobblestone street in the upper town, flanked by a vibrant red townhouse on the right and a historic stone manor on the left. Geralt walks steadily downhill toward an ornate stone archway ahead, passing a woman with a parasol and a standing guard. The street is enclosed by tall buildings with the sky visible only as a narrow strip above.

scene_state.functional_zone: terrace walkway with panoramic lake and mountain views

events.description: passes through stone archway with red columns into open terrace revealing expansive lake view
emerges from shadow of enclosed street into bright direct sunlight on open terrace

agents.ego_description: walking along the elevated terrace path with stone balustrade, overlooking the scenic lake and distant mountains

entered.detail: low stone balustrade with pillars lining the terrace edge overlooking the valley
expansive blue lake visible through the archway and beyond the terrace
distant mountain peaks framing the lake horizon under teal sky
tall slender green cypress trees dotting the hillside below the terrace

segments.scene_description: Passing through the stone archway, the scene opens dramatically onto a sunlit terrace with sweeping views of a blue lake and distant mountains. The camera moves along a cobblestone path bordered by a stone retaining wall on the right, while the large historic manor building remains visible on the left. The lighting shifts from shadowed street to bright midday sun as the lake view emerges.

scene_state.functional_zone: winding hillside path descending toward lakeside town gate

events.description: approaches and passes through the stone gate structure with red roof tower

agents.ego_description: descending the winding cobblestone path toward the stone gate, with lush greenery and lake views expanding to the right

entered.detail: rustic stone archway gate with red tiled roof tower and wooden doors marking the lower town entrance
dense clusters of red and purple flowering bushes lining the path
small stone houses with red roofs visible through the gate and along the hillside

segments.scene_description: The path continues descending through lush vegetation with dense flower bushes on the right and the large manor building receding to the left. The camera approaches a distinctive stone gate structure with a red roof tower that marks the entrance to the lower town. The lake and mountains remain visible in the background as the path winds downward through the greenery.

scene_state.functional_zone: lower town street with rustic stone cottages and waterfront market activity

events.description: passes through stone gate into the lower town area with denser buildings and market stalls

agents.ego_description: walking through the lower town past stone cottages and market stalls, navigating around seated and standing NPCs with the lake visible ahead

notable_agents.action: woman in green dress sitting on stone wall beside the path
townsman in brown tunic walking uphill carrying a basket

entered.detail: wooden market stall with displayed goods and fabric awning
rough stone retaining wall with potted plants on top

segments.scene_description: Passing through the stone gate, the scene transitions into the lower town's narrow cobblestone streets lined with rustic stone cottages and market stalls. The camera navigates past NPCs including a seated woman and a walking townsman, while the lake view remains visible in the distance between the buildings. The environment feels more lived-in and crowded compared to the open terrace above.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from the enclosed upper streets of a vibrant town, opening onto a scenic terrace before descending into a crowded lower district. It begins on a narrow cobblestone street flanked by a red townhouse and a stone manor, moving downhill past a guard and a woman with a parasol toward an ornate archway. As the camera passes through the arch, the scene opens dramatically into bright midday sun on a terrace with sweeping views of a blue lake and distant mountains. The path then winds downward through lush flower bushes and past a red-roofed stone gate, while the manor recedes and the lake remains a constant backdrop. Finally, the camera transitions into the lower town, navigating through rustic stone cottages and market stalls populated by locals as the environment becomes more lived-in and dense.
